description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:14-alpine Docker image and a cache of node_modules/. Define a test stage with two jobs. The test_async job runs yarn install --frozen-lockfile, then yarn test, then yarn lint. The dependabot job extends a .dependabot-gitlab template that uses the $DEPENDABOT_IMAGE (docker.io/andrcuns/dependabot-gitlab:0.23.0) with an empty entrypoint, changes to /home/dependabot/app and runs bundle exec rake "dependabot:update[$PROJECT_PATH,$PACKAGE_MANAGER,$DIRECTORY]"; it sets GIT_STRATEGY none, PACKAGE_MANAGER npm, RAILS_ENV production, SECRET_KEY_BASE key, SETTINGS__GITLAB_URL $CI_SERVER_URL, SETTINGS__LOG_COLOR true, SETTINGS__STANDALONE true, and is triggered only on scheduled pipelines when $PACKAGE_MANAGER_SET matches npm or yarn, and is disabled if $DEPENDENCY_UPDATES_DISABLED is true.
